hero.description: Manufacturer of air handling components, fire protection elements and industrial heating for projects worldwide.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Comprehensive range of air handling components

footer.description: MANDÍK, a.s. is a company with over thirty years of tradition. We supply technologically advanced products to demanding customers around the world. Development and production take place under one roof in the Czech Republic, allowing us to respond flexibly to specific requirements. We build on quality, precision and reliability, and we are a partner you can rely on from design to long-term service.
